field.label: Enable vendor driver
field.help: Load the Realtek vendor driver at boot instead of relying on the base kernel driver path.

field.label: Enable interrupt filter
field.help: Sets hw.re.intr_filter=1. This can reduce interrupt overhead on hardware with MSI or MSI-X support.

field.label: Disable MSI
field.help: Sets hw.re.msi_disable=1. Use this when the interface is unstable with MSI enabled.

field.label: Disable MSI-X
field.help: Sets hw.re.msix_disable=1. Use this when the interface is unstable with MSI-X enabled.

field.label: Prefer I/O mapping
field.help: Sets hw.re.prefer_iomap=1. Keep disabled unless your hardware shows mapping-related issues.

field.label: Maximum RX mbuf size
field.help: Sets hw.re.max_rx_mbuf_sz. Use 2048 when you do not need jumbo frames and want to reduce the risk of hangs on fragmented memory.

field.label: Interface unit
field.help: Interface number used for per-device tuning, for example 0 for re0 or 1 for re1.

field.label: RX interrupt moderation
field.help: Sets dev.re.N.int_rx_mod for the selected interface unit. Lower values reduce latency, higher values reduce CPU overhead. Valid range is 0 to 65 microseconds.

field.label: Enable Wake-on-LAN from S5
field.help: Sets hw.re.s5wol=1 for systems that need Wake-on-LAN support from soft-off state.

field.label: Enable S0 magic packet support
field.help: Sets hw.re.s0_magic_packet=1 for hardware that requires explicit magic packet handling.
